summary: Iteration 10 - Comprehensive pre-deployment verification for Hönsgården app. Tested: Login page, Registration form with GDPR consent, Email/password login, Google login button, Forgot password flow, Dashboard, Navigation menu, Premium page with Stripe checkout, Settings page, Egg registration modal, Statistics page, Finance page, Hens page, Logout, Build version banner. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: Endpoint is at /api/transactions, not /api/finance/transactions - test script was corrected

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Login page at /api/web/login loads correctly with Swedish UI
✅ Registration form has all fields (Name*, Email*, Password*, Terms checkbox*, Marketing checkbox)
✅ GDPR consent text correctly references honsgarden.se (not Aurora Media)
✅ Google login button ('Fortsätt med Google') visible on welcome, login, and registration screens
✅ Forgot password flow works - sends email confirmation without revealing if account exists
✅ Dashboard loads after login with weather widget, AI-insikter, Snabbåtgärder
✅ Navigation menu works - Hem, Ägg, Hönor, Ekonomi, Statistik, Inställningar
✅ Premium page shows all 12 premium features and Stripe checkout buttons
✅ Settings page shows premium status and upgrade/cancel button
✅ Build version banner visible in sidebar footer (Build: 2026-02-25 22:09)
✅ Stripe checkout flow initiates correctly (buttons visible)

success_rate.backend: 96% (24/25 tests passed - 1 minor test path issue)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test user from iteration 9
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified in iteration 10. Backend tests in test_iteration10_comprehensive.py cover auth, premium, hens, eggs, statistics, transactions. Test user testuser2@example.com/password123 has trial premium. Webapp served at /api/web. All API endpoints at /api prefix. Stripe is configured with live keys in test mode.
